title: Is Unstructured Data The Key To Successful AI Deployments?
summary: Alex Kantrowitz and Hyland executives discuss how unstructured data is critical for successful enterprise AI deployments. They highlight how companies like Erie Insurance leverage unstructured data to provide context for agentic systems, moving beyond failed AI pilots and token limitations.
writeup: Alex Kantrowitz and Hyland executives examine why unstructured data is central to enterprise AI deployments. The discussion frames unstructured data as the context that agentic systems need to function, citing Erie Insurance as an example of a company applying it. The conversation positions this approach as a way past failed AI pilots and token limitations.
